events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: commercial HVAC-R terminations & balancing, observed field condition: supply short-circuiting to return. Work tested/inspected. Reference SMACNA, TAB reports. Need compare field condition against referenced document. Decision fail because non-compliant/defective. Risk? Supply short-circuiting to return can cause reduced ventilation, energy waste, temperature control issues, maybe not critical safety but high functional risk in commercial. Could be medium/high. Need decide. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 100 since tested/inspected but defective. value not asked 0. sound_source etc default empty? Schema says string for sound_source, event_time number, rate number, order array, workable array. Use defaults: sound_source: "", event_time: 0.0, rate: 0.0, order: [], workable: []. findings: supply air short-circuiting to return, ineffective distribution, failed TAB/balance. actions: identify and seal short-circuit path, relocate/extend supply/return terminals, rebalance, retest per SMACNA/TAB. rationale: supply air recirculating directly to return bypasses conditioned space, violates design intent and SMACNA duct design/TAB standards; confirmed by inspection/TAB. references: SMACNA HVAC Duct Construction Standards, TAB standards (e.g., AABC/NEBB/ASHRAE 111), maybe building code. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "tested/inspected",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 100,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Supply air is short-circuiting directly into the return path, bypassing the conditioned space.",
    "Air distribution is ineffective; occupied zones are not receiving intended supply airflow.",
    "TAB measurements/report indicate imbalance and recirculation rather than proper room pressurization/ventilation.",
    "Installation does not conform to design intent or SMACNA/TAB requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Locate and eliminate the short-circuit path (e.g., relocate/extend supply/return terminals, install baffles, seal improper connections).",
    "Verify terminal locations, throws, and minimum separation per design and SMACNA guidance.",
    "Rebalance the system and update TAB report to confirm design airflow, room pressurization, and ventilation rates.",
    "Re-inspect and obtain third-party sign-off before acceptance."
  ],
  "rationale": "Supply air recirculating directly to return defeats space conditioning and ventilation, is a defective installation, and fails TAB/design intent; therefore the work fails inspection.",
  "references": [
    "SMACNA HVAC Duct Construction Standards",
    "SMACNA HVAC Air Duct Leakage Test Manual",
    "TAB industry standards (AABC / NEBB / ASHRAE 111)",
    "Project drawings, equipment tags, and approved submittals"
  ]
}
